desc.zh: AI芯片龙头，GPU+CUDA平台驱动数据中心、自动驾驶、游戏三大业务
desc.en: AI chip leader; GPU + CUDA platform powering data centers, autonomous driving, and gaming

summary.zh: NVDA仍是AI基础设施的绝对龙头。最新Q4营收$68.1B（+73% YoY），净利$43B，FCF margin 51%。Forward PE已降至16.6x，估值正在被增长消化。当前$178距52周高$212跌16%，处于合理偏低区间。
summary.en: NVDA remains the undisputed AI infrastructure leader. Latest Q4 revenue $68.1B (+73% YoY), net income $43B, FCF margin 51%. Forward PE compressed to 16.6x as growth digests premium. At $178, down 16% from 52wk high of $212.

verdict.zh: 买入 — 16.6x Fwd PE+73%增长=罕见机会
verdict.en: BUY — 16.6x Fwd PE with 73% growth is rare

zh.a: AI算力=结构性需求。Blackwell出货加速，CUDA生态无可替代。

zh.q: 赚得更多？ — 大概率是
zh.a: Fwd EPS $10.74 vs 当前$4.91，增长确定性高。长期将回归15-25%。
CUDA生态+工具链+开发者=深度护城河。自研芯片(Google TPU等)是边际风险。

en.a: AI compute = structural demand. Blackwell ramping, CUDA ecosystem irreplaceable.
Fwd EPS $10.74 vs current $4.91. Growth normalizes to 15-25% long-term.
CUDA ecosystem + toolchain + developers = deep moat. In-house chips are marginal risk.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: NVDA=卖铲子，CUDA=护城河。AI基建结构性需求。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 好公司但芯片迭代快。$373B现金=耐心等待。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 垄断级定价权+73%毛利=梦想企业。16.6x Fwd PE低于增速。

en.name: DYP
en.q: NVDA = selling shovels. CUDA = moat. Structural AI demand.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Great business but chip cycles are fast. $373B cash = patience.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Monopoly-like pricing + 73% gross margin = dream business. 16.6x fwd PE below growth rate.

moat.zh: CUDA开发者生态+数据中心GPU垄断+AI训练推理全栈
moat.en: CUDA developer ecosystem + data center GPU monopoly + full AI training/inference stack

valuation.zh: Fwd PE 16.6x远低于73%营收增速，PEG<0.3。但绝对估值(PS 20x)仍高。
valuation.en: Fwd PE 16.6x well below 73% revenue growth, PEG<0.3. Absolute valuation (PS 20x) still elevated.

desc.zh: 消费电子之王，iPhone+服务双引擎，AI战略加速
desc.en: Consumer electronics king; iPhone + Services dual engine, AI strategy accelerating

summary.zh: AAPL Q4营收$143.8B(+15.7%)，FCF $51.6B(margin 35.9%)。服务收入持续增长，Apple Intelligence推进中。$257距52周高$289跌11%。关税风险是短期变量。
summary.en: AAPL Q4 revenue $143.8B (+15.7%), FCF $51.6B (35.9% margin). Services growing steadily. Apple Intelligence rolling out. At $257, 11% below 52wk high. Tariff risk is near-term variable.

verdict.zh: 持有 — 优质但估值不便宜

zh.a: 生态锁定20亿设备用户，服务收入高毛利。
服务占比持续提升，AI功能增强用户粘性。
品牌+生态+隐私=消费电子最深护城河。

en.a: 2B device ecosystem lock-in, high-margin services.
Services mix rising, AI features enhance stickiness.
Brand + ecosystem + privacy = deepest consumer moat.

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 仍为BRK最大持仓，但已连续减持。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 品牌忠诚度=定价权。服务转型成功。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Cash cow + ecosystem monopoly. 152% ROE is stunning.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Still BRK's largest holding but continuously reduced.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Brand loyalty = pricing power. Services transition successful.

moat.zh: 品牌+iOS生态+20亿活跃设备+隐私定位
moat.en: Brand + iOS ecosystem + 2B active devices + privacy positioning

valuation.zh: Fwd PE 27.7x对15.7%增速偏高。等$230以下更有安全边际。
valuation.en: Fwd PE 27.7x somewhat high for 15.7% growth. Wait for sub-$230 for margin of safety.

desc.zh: 企业软件+云计算+AI三位一体，Azure+Copilot驱动增长
desc.en: Enterprise software + cloud + AI trinity; Azure + Copilot driving growth

summary.zh: MSFT Q4营收$81.3B(+16.7%)，净利$38.5B(margin 47.3%)。Azure+AI Copilot双引擎。$409距52周高$555跌26%，估值已回到合理区间。Capex $29.9B巨额投入AI。
summary.en: MSFT Q4 revenue $81.3B (+16.7%), net income $38.5B (47.3% margin). Azure + AI Copilot dual engine. At $409, 26% off 52wk high $555, valuation reasonable. $29.9B capex shows massive AI investment.

verdict.zh: 买入 — 21.7x Fwd PE+AI落地最确定的大厂
verdict.en: BUY — 21.7x Fwd PE, most reliable AI monetizer among big tech

zh.a: 企业软件+云=必需品。切换成本极高。
Copilot渗透率提升+Azure增长，Fwd EPS $18.84(+18%)。
Office+Azure+GitHub+Teams=企业IT全栈锁定。

en.a: Enterprise software + cloud = necessities. Extremely high switching costs.
Copilot penetration rising + Azure growth, Fwd EPS $18.84 (+18%).
Office + Azure + GitHub + Teams = full enterprise IT stack lock-in.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: AI商业化最确定路径。47%净利率=印钞机。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 与盖茨关系回避持仓。认可商业模式。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 切换成本=永久护城河。Azure是AWS最强对手。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Most certain AI monetization path. 47% net margin = money printer.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Avoids due to Gates relationship. Acknowledges business model.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Switching costs = permanent moat. Azure is AWS's strongest rival.

moat.zh: 企业IT全栈+Azure云+AI Copilot+GitHub开发者
moat.en: Enterprise IT stack + Azure cloud + AI Copilot + GitHub developers

valuation.zh: 21.7x Fwd PE历史中位数偏低。$409是近两年性价比最高的位置。
valuation.en: 21.7x Fwd PE below historical median. $409 is most attractive entry in 2 years.

desc.zh: 会员制仓储零售巨头，极致低价+会员费=稳定现金流
desc.en: Membership warehouse retail giant; ultra-low prices + membership fees = stable cash flow

summary.zh: COST刚发Q1财报Top/Bottom Line双超预期。$998临近52周高$1067，PE 43.9x偏贵。会员续订率97%+是核心。关税风险可控因直采模式。
summary.en: COST just beat on both top and bottom line. At $998 near 52wk high $1067, PE 43.9x is pricey. 97%+ membership renewal is the core. Tariff risk manageable via direct sourcing.

verdict.zh: 持有 — 极好公司但太贵
verdict.en: HOLD — Excellent company but too expensive

zh.a: 会员制零售=消费刚需+通胀受益。

zh.q: 赚得更多？ — 稳定增长
zh.a: 会员费提价+开新店=10%稳定增长。
43.9x Fwd PE对9%增速过高。等回调至$850-900。

en.a: Membership retail = consumer necessity + inflation beneficiary.
Fee increases + new stores = 10% steady growth.
43.9x Fwd PE too high for 9% growth. Wait for $850-900 pullback.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 好模式但太贵。等大幅回调。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 已故搭档最爱股票。护城河清晰。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 会员制=定价权。97%续订=护城河。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Great model but too expensive. Wait for pullback.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Membership model = pricing power. 97% renewal = moat.

moat.zh: 会员制+规模采购+低毛利策略=竞争者难以复制
moat.en: Membership model + scale procurement + low-margin strategy = hard to replicate

valuation.zh: 历史最高估值区间。等PE回到35x以下更安全。
valuation.en: At historical high valuation band. Wait for PE below 35x for safety.

desc.zh: 搜索+广告+云计算+AI巨头，Gemini AI引领下一代搜索
desc.en: Search + ads + cloud + AI giant; Gemini AI leading next-gen search

summary.zh: GOOGL Q4营收$113.8B(+18%)，搜索+云双增长。$298距52周高$349跌15%。$127B现金在手。Gemini AI表现强劲，云业务加速。估值合理。
summary.en: GOOGL Q4 revenue $113.8B (+18%), search + cloud dual growth. At $298, 15% off 52wk high $349. $127B cash on hand. Gemini AI performing well, cloud accelerating. Fair valuation.

verdict.zh: 买入 — 增长加速+估值合理

zh.a: 搜索垄断+AI转型领先+YouTube=不可替代。
云增速40%+，Gemini商业化起步。
搜索数据壁垒+AI模型+YouTube+安卓生态。

en.a: Search monopoly + AI leadership + YouTube = irreplaceable.
Cloud growing 40%+, Gemini commercialization beginning.
Search data moat + AI models + YouTube + Android ecosystem.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 搜索垄断+AI领先=长期赢家。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 广告业务有周期性。但认可护城河。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 数据壁垒=永久护城河。22x PE合理。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Search monopoly + AI leadership = long-term winner.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Ad business is cyclical. But moat acknowledged.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Data moat = permanent. 22x PE is fair.

moat.zh: 搜索数据壁垒+Gemini AI+YouTube+安卓+云
moat.en: Search data moat + Gemini AI + YouTube + Android + Cloud

valuation.zh: 22.2x Fwd PE对18%增速合理。有上行空间。
valuation.en: 22.2x Fwd PE fair for 18% growth. Upside potential.

desc.zh: 电商+AWS云+AI三驾马车，全球最大基础设施公司
desc.en: E-commerce + AWS cloud + AI triple engine; world's largest infrastructure company

summary.zh: AMZN Q4营收$213.4B(+13.6%)。AWS加速+广告业务高利润。$213距52周高$259跌18%。Capex $39.5B重注AI基建。净利率从亏损到10.8%的转型已完成。
summary.en: AMZN Q4 revenue $213.4B (+13.6%). AWS accelerating + high-margin ads. At $213, 18% off 52wk high $259. $39.5B capex on AI infra. Net margin transformation from loss to 10.8% complete.

verdict.zh: 买入 — 利润拐点确认，估值合理
verdict.en: BUY — Profit inflection confirmed, fair valuation

zh.a: 电商+云=双垄断。Prime会员粘性极强。
AWS+广告高利润组合持续扩张。
物流网络+AWS+Prime生态=三重护城河。

en.a: E-commerce + cloud = dual monopoly. Prime stickiness extreme.
AWS + ads high-margin mix keeps expanding.
Logistics network + AWS + Prime ecosystem = triple moat.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 三重护城河。利润率扩张刚开始。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: Bezos是这代最好的企业家之一。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Triple moat. Margin expansion just beginning.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Expressed regret for not buying earlier.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Bezos is one of the best entrepreneurs of this generation.

moat.zh: 物流基础设施+AWS+Prime+广告平台
moat.en: Logistics infra + AWS + Prime + advertising platform

valuation.zh: 22.8x Fwd PE+利润率扩张=合理偏低。
valuation.en: 22.8x Fwd PE + margin expansion = fair to undervalued.

desc.zh: 社交媒体帝国，广告AI化+Llama开源AI+Reality Labs
desc.en: Social media empire; AI-powered ads + Llama open-source AI + Reality Labs

summary.zh: META Q4营收$59.9B(+23.8%)，82%毛利率。Llama AI开源战略+广告AI优化驱动增长。$645距52周高$796跌19%。Fwd PE仅18x，被地缘风险压制。
summary.en: META Q4 revenue $59.9B (+23.8%), 82% gross margin. Llama AI open-source + ad AI optimization driving growth. At $645, 19% off 52wk high $796. Fwd PE only 18x, suppressed by geopolitical risk.

verdict.zh: 强烈买入 — 18x PE+24%增长+82%毛利=被低估
verdict.en: STRONG BUY — 18x PE + 24% growth + 82% gross margin = undervalued

zh.a: 40亿日活用户=人类注意力的最大入口。

zh.q: 赚得更多？ — 高确定性
zh.a: Fwd EPS $35.88 vs $23.47(+53%)。广告AI效率提升。
社交图谱+广告数据+Llama AI=综合壁垒。

en.a: 4B daily users = largest human attention gateway.
Fwd EPS $35.88 vs $23.47 (+53%). Ad AI efficiency improving.
Social graph + ad data + Llama AI = comprehensive barrier.

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 广告模式依赖注意力经济，有周期性。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 网络效应=自然垄断。82%毛利=定价权。

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Ad model depends on attention economy, cyclical.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Network effect = natural monopoly. 82% gross margin = pricing power.

moat.zh: 社交图谱网络效应+广告数据+Llama开源AI生态
moat.en: Social graph network effects + ad data + Llama open-source AI ecosystem

valuation.en: 18x Fwd PE is cheapest in MAG7. PEG<0.8.

desc.zh: 全球最大芯片代工厂，先进制程垄断者，AI芯片制造核心
desc.en: World's largest chip foundry; advanced node monopolist; core AI chip manufacturer

summary.zh: TSM Q4营收NT$1.05T(+20.5%)，净利率48.3%。AI芯片代工垄断地位。$339距52周高$390跌13%。地缘风险(台海)是唯一担忧，但已开始美国扩产。
summary.en: TSM Q4 revenue NT$1.05T (+20.5%), 48.3% net margin. AI chip foundry monopoly. At $339, 13% off 52wk high $390. Geopolitical risk (Taiwan Strait) is sole concern, but US expansion underway.

verdict.zh: 买入 — AI供应链最不可替代的环节
verdict.en: BUY — Most irreplaceable link in AI supply chain

zh.a: 先进制程没有替代者。3nm/2nm垄断。
AI需求推动ASP上升+产能扩张。
台海风险是尾部风险。美国/日本建厂分散。

en.a: No alternative for advanced nodes. 3nm/2nm monopoly.
AI demand driving ASP increase + capacity expansion.
Taiwan Strait is tail risk. US/Japan fabs diversifying.

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 因地缘风险已卖出。认可业务质量。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 垄断+高壁垒。但地缘是无法定价的风险。

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Exited on geopolitical risk. Acknowledges business quality.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Monopoly + high barriers. But geopolitics is unquantifiable risk.

moat.zh: 先进制程垄断+巨额Capex壁垒+客户锁定
moat.en: Advanced node monopoly + massive capex barrier + customer lock-in

valuation.zh: 18.9x Fwd PE+20%增长+45%净利率=性价比极高。
valuation.en: 18.9x Fwd PE + 20% growth + 45% net margin = excellent value.

desc.zh: 巴菲特旗舰，保险+能源+铁路+巨额现金储备
desc.en: Buffett's flagship; insurance + energy + railroads + massive cash reserves

summary.zh: BRK-B $499，$373B现金创纪录。在地缘动荡中表现稳健(beta 0.69)。Q4营收$111.4B。巴菲特即将95岁，接班人Greg Abel已就位。
summary.en: BRK-B at $499, record $373B cash. Stable in geopolitical turmoil (beta 0.69). Q4 revenue $111.4B. Buffett approaching 95, successor Greg Abel in place.

verdict.en: HOLD — Safe haven in turbulent times

zh.a: 保险浮存金+BNSF+能源=永续现金流。
$373B现金待部署。关键看能否在大跌时出手。
品牌+规模+保险浮存金=独特模式。

en.a: Insurance float + BNSF + energy = perpetual cash flow.
$373B cash to deploy. Key is whether they buy the dip.
Brand + scale + insurance float = unique model.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 最好的防御性资产。$373B现金=弹药。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 持续回购。年报强调保险和能源价值。

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Continues buybacks. Annual letter emphasizes insurance and energy value.

moat.zh: 保险浮存金+品牌+规模+资本配置能力
moat.en: Insurance float + brand + scale + capital allocation

valuation.zh: 1.5x P/B历史中位数。$373B现金提供巨大安全垫。
valuation.en: 1.5x P/B at historical median. $373B cash provides massive safety cushion.

desc.zh: 中国电商+云计算龙头，AI战略重启，估值极低
desc.en: China's e-commerce + cloud leader; AI strategy restarting; extremely undervalued

summary.zh: BABA $131，PE仅14.9x，PS 0.3x(vs AMZN 3.2x)。中国两会政策支持+关税诉讼缓和。恒指+1.72%提振中概情绪。AI战略(通义)加速。beta仅0.44=低波动。
summary.en: BABA at $131, PE only 14.9x, PS 0.3x (vs AMZN 3.2x). NPC policy support + tariff lawsuit easing. HSI +1.72% boosting China sentiment. AI strategy (Tongyi) accelerating. Beta 0.44 = low vol.

verdict.zh: 买入 — 极度低估的中国科技龙头
verdict.en: BUY — Extremely undervalued China tech leader

zh.a: 中国消费基础设施+云=不可替代。
增速放缓至5%。关键看AI和国际化。
VIE结构+中美关系=估值永久折价因素。

en.a: China consumer infrastructure + cloud = irreplaceable.
Growth slowing to 5%. Key is AI and internationalization.
VIE structure + US-China tensions = permanent valuation discount.

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 2022年买入后快速卖出。地缘风险。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: Daily Journal曾大量持有。认可商业模式。

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Bought in 2022, quickly sold. Geopolitical risk.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Daily Journal held significant position. Business model approved.

moat.zh: 中国电商基础设施+支付宝+云+物流网络
moat.en: China e-commerce infra + Alipay + cloud + logistics network

valuation.zh: 14.9x PE+0.3x PS=历史最低区间。地缘折价过度。
valuation.en: 14.9x PE + 0.3x PS = historical low band. Geopolitical discount excessive.

desc.zh: CPU+GPU双线追赶，MI300系列AI芯片抢NVDA份额
desc.en: CPU + GPU dual-track challenger; MI300 AI chips gaining share from NVDA

summary.zh: AMD Q4营收$10.3B(+34.1%)，净利增213%。MI300X在AI推理市场获得份额。$192距52周高$267跌28%。Fwd PE 17.7x+34%增速=PEG 0.5。
summary.en: AMD Q4 revenue $10.3B (+34.1%), net income +213%. MI300X gaining share in AI inference. At $192, 28% off 52wk high $267. Fwd PE 17.7x + 34% growth = PEG 0.5.

verdict.zh: 买入 — AI第二选择，估值合理
verdict.en: BUY — AI's second choice, fair valuation

zh.a: x86 CPU+AI GPU双赛道。云厂商需要替代供应商。

zh.q: 赚得更多？ — 高确定性
zh.a: Fwd EPS从$2.62到$10.88，增长4倍。MI300系列放量。
x86授权+MI300竞争力强，但vs NVDA CUDA仍有差距。

en.a: x86 CPU + AI GPU dual track. Cloud vendors need alternatives.
Fwd EPS from $2.62 to $10.88, 4x growth. MI300 series ramping.
x86 license + MI300 competitive, but gap vs NVDA CUDA remains.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: AI GPU第二供应商。17.7x PE便宜。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: 芯片竞争激烈，不在能力圈内。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 好公司但NVDA优势太大。需要独特催化剂。

en.name: DYP
en.q: AI GPU second source. 17.7x PE is cheap.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Chip competition fierce, outside circle of competence.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Good company but NVDA advantage too large. Needs unique catalyst.

moat.zh: x86授权+MI300 AI芯片+数据中心CPU份额持续增长
moat.en: x86 license + MI300 AI chips + growing data center CPU share

valuation.en: 17.7x Fwd PE + 34% growth = PEG 0.5, excellent value.

desc.zh: 综合能源巨头，上游+炼油+化工，高股息
desc.en: Integrated energy major; upstream + refining + chemicals, high dividend

summary.zh: CVX直接受益中东地缘局势，WTI破$85+。$190逼近52周高$192。3.75%股息+回购。原油$90+时EPS弹性巨大。
summary.en: CVX directly benefits from Middle East tensions, WTI above $85. At $190 near 52wk high $192. 3.75% dividend + buybacks. Massive EPS upside at $90+ oil.

verdict.zh: 持有 — 地缘红利已反映，留意油价回落风险
verdict.en: HOLD — Geopolitical premium priced in, watch for oil pullback

zh.a: 全球仍依赖化石能源。CVX有转型布局。
EPS高度依赖油价。$90油价时盈利弹性大。
上游资源+炼油网络+品牌。

en.a: World still depends on fossil fuels. CVX has transition plans.
EPS highly correlated with oil. Massive upside at $90+ oil.
Upstream assets + refining network + brand.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 周期股。地缘推高但不持久。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: BRK持有大量CVX。看好能源长期价值。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 能源=文明基础设施。3.75%股息安全。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Cyclical. Geopolitics boost but not durable.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: BRK holds significant CVX. Long-term energy value.

moat.zh: 上游资源禀赋+Permian盆地产量+全球炼油网络
moat.en: Upstream resource base + Permian Basin output + global refining network

valuation.zh: 当前油价下EPS弹性大。3.75%股息提供下行保护。
valuation.en: Massive EPS upside at current oil prices. 3.75% dividend provides downside protection.

desc.zh: 美国最大合规加密交易所，Crypto金融基建核心
desc.en: Largest US regulated crypto exchange; core crypto financial infrastructure

summary.zh: COIN $197，距52周高$445跌56%。Q4营收-21.6% YoY，出现亏损。但85%毛利率+BTC ETF托管收入=周期底部。SEC对行业态度转软(孙宇晨撤诉)。
summary.en: COIN at $197, 56% off 52wk high $445. Q4 revenue -21.6% YoY, reported loss. But 85% gross margin + BTC ETF custody = cycle trough. SEC softening stance (Sun case dismissed).

verdict.zh: 观望 — 等BTC企稳再加仓
verdict.en: WATCH — Wait for BTC stabilization before adding

zh.a: 美国合规加密基建=政策壁垒。ETF托管不可替代。
高beta(3.7)，收入随加密周期剧烈波动。
合规牌照+ETF托管，但竞争加剧(Robinhood等)。

en.a: US regulated crypto infra = regulatory barrier. ETF custody irreplaceable.
High beta (3.7), revenue swings with crypto cycles.
Compliance licenses + ETF custody, but competition increasing (Robinhood etc).

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 合规壁垒有价值，但周期性太强。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 对加密资产持批评态度。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Compliance barrier has value, but too cyclical.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Does not invest in crypto-related assets.

moat.zh: 美国合规牌照+BTC ETF托管+机构关系
moat.en: US regulatory licenses + BTC ETF custody + institutional relationships

valuation.zh: 周期底部估值。BTC回暖时弹性巨大。
valuation.en: Trough valuation. Massive upside if BTC recovers.

desc.zh: 企业CRM SaaS龙头，Agentforce AI Agent平台驱动下一波增长
desc.en: Enterprise CRM SaaS leader; Agentforce AI Agent platform driving next growth wave

summary.zh: CRM Q4营收$11.2B(+12.1%)，FCF $5.3B(margin 47.5%惊人)。$202距52周高$296跌32%。Fwd PE仅13.6x，FCF yield 8.6%。Agentforce AI Agent产品即将放量。被严重低估。
summary.en: CRM Q4 revenue $11.2B (+12.1%), FCF $5.3B (47.5% margin stunning). At $202, 32% off 52wk high $296. Fwd PE only 13.6x, FCF yield 8.6%. Agentforce AI Agent product about to scale. Severely undervalued.

verdict.zh: 强烈买入 — 13.6x PE+8.6% FCF Yield=最被低估的SaaS
verdict.en: STRONG BUY — 13.6x PE + 8.6% FCF Yield = most undervalued SaaS

zh.a: 企业CRM=刚需。Salesforce=行业标准。
Fwd EPS $14.91(+91%)。Agentforce开启AI upsell。
客户数据锁定+生态系统+AI Agent先发优势。

en.a: Enterprise CRM = necessity. Salesforce = industry standard.
Fwd EPS $14.91 (+91%). Agentforce opens AI upsell.
Customer data lock-in + ecosystem + AI Agent first-mover.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: 最便宜的企业SaaS龙头。8.6% FCF yield罕见。

zh.name: Buffett
zh.q: SaaS不在能力圈。但认可订阅模式。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 切换成本高=护城河。47.5% FCF margin=印钞。

en.name: DYP
en.q: Cheapest enterprise SaaS leader. 8.6% FCF yield is rare.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: SaaS outside circle. But subscription model approved.

en.name: Munger
en.q: High switching costs = moat. 47.5% FCF margin = money printing.

moat.en: CRM data lock-in + AppExchange ecosystem + Agentforce AI

valuation.zh: 13.6x Fwd PE是5年最低。8.6% FCF yield超过大多数债券。
valuation.en: 13.6x Fwd PE is 5-year low. 8.6% FCF yield exceeds most bonds.

desc.zh: 美国最大健康保险公司+Optum医疗服务/数据/药房
desc.en: Largest US health insurer + Optum health services/data/pharmacy

summary.zh: UNH $286距52周高$606暴跌53%。Q4净利几乎为零(-99.8% YoY)。DOJ调查+Medicare成本压力。但Fwd PE 14.3x+3.09%股息=长期价值。⚠️高风险高回报。
summary.en: UNH at $286, 53% crash from 52wk high $606. Q4 net income near zero (-99.8% YoY). DOJ investigation + Medicare cost pressure. But Fwd PE 14.3x + 3.09% dividend = long-term value. ⚠️ High risk, high reward.

verdict.zh: 观望 — 基本面恶化中，等DOJ调查明朗
verdict.en: WATCH — Fundamentals deteriorating, wait for DOJ clarity

zh.a: 美国医疗体系核心=不会消失。
Q4净利几乎归零。成本压力+调查风险。
规模优势仍在，但政策风险大增。

en.a: Core of US healthcare system = won't disappear.
Q4 net income near zero. Cost pressure + investigation risk.
Scale advantage remains but policy risk increased significantly.

zh.name: DYP
zh.q: DOJ调查是重大不确定性。等明朗再看。

zh.name: Munger
zh.q: 好公司遇到大麻烦。价值陷阱可能性。

en.name: DYP
en.q: DOJ investigation is major uncertainty. Wait for clarity.

en.name: Munger
en.q: Good company facing big trouble. Value trap possible.

moat.zh: 规模+Optum垂直整合+数据壁垒（受DOJ威胁）
moat.en: Scale + Optum vertical integration + data moat (threatened by DOJ)

valuation.zh: 14.3x Fwd PE是10年最低。如果DOJ风险解除则极低估。
valuation.en: 14.3x Fwd PE is 10-year low. Extremely undervalued if DOJ risk clears.

desc.zh: 全球最大上市石油公司，上游+下游+化工全产业链
desc.en: World's largest listed oil company; upstream + downstream + chemicals full chain

summary.zh: XOM $151逼近52周高$160，受中东地缘+WTI $85+推升。2.72%股息+持续回购。原油$90时盈利弹性更大。beta仅0.35=低波动避风港。
summary.en: XOM at $151 approaching 52wk high $160, boosted by Middle East + WTI above $85. 2.72% dividend + ongoing buybacks. Even more earnings upside at $90 oil. Beta only 0.35 = low-vol safe haven.

verdict.zh: 持有 — 地缘红利+高股息，但注意油价回落
verdict.en: HOLD — Geopolitical premium + high dividend, but watch oil pullback

zh.a: 化石能源不会消失。XOM在碳捕捉有布局。

zh.q: 赚得更多？ — 看油价周期
zh.a: 当前地缘推高但不持久。长期看$70-80油价。
全球最大储量+炼油网络+品牌。

en.a: Fossil fuels won't disappear. XOM investing in carbon capture.
Current geopolitical boost not durable. Long-term $70-80 oil.
Largest global reserves + refining network + brand.

en.name: Buffett
en.q: Energy = long-term value. Shifted to CVX.

moat.zh: 全球储量+Permian盆地+炼油网络+化工
moat.en: Global reserves + Permian Basin + refining network + chemicals

valuation.zh: 18x Fwd PE+2.72%股息。油价$85+时处于公允水平。
valuation.en: 18x Fwd PE + 2.72% dividend. Fair at $85+ oil.
